## ShNodes.ShArithmExprNode type

The union of concrete node types mvdan/sh's `syntax.ArithmExpr` interface can hold.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ShArithmExprNode =
  ShBinaryArithmNode | ShFlagsArithmNode | ShParenArithmNode | ShUnaryArithmNode | ShWordNode;
```
